patterns_recognized: Negative-edge GOLD picks reliably fail (HARD CAP 1 validated 6+ times in archive): correctly fires today on CIN@CLE (edge=-11.18pp) and ARI@COL (edge=-4.68pp). No qualitative context overrides HARD CAP 1.

DIAMOND tier is reliable when p_model < 0.85 AND f5_full_delta < 0.10 AND all three F-signals fire without asterisk: SF@OAK today meets all conditions (F1=2.55 full-sample, F2=0.033, F3=6345.7, PQI=+35.0) — the sole staked pick.

Small-sample SP asterisk combined with elite opposing ace and market pricing >60% against the pick is a validated DOWNGRADE trigger: PHI@PIT today has min_pa=95 for Skenes xERA comparison vs confirmed Zack Wheeler (elite), market 62.7% PHI, and calibration_caution_18_25pp edge band — all three conditions converge.

Coors park f5_full_delta is a systematic park artifact: ARI@COL today shows COL wins F5 at 18.51% (ARI 81.49%) but only 53.44% ARI full-game — the 2026-05-15 postgame confirmed ARI won 9-1 as the Coors bullpen collapse pattern holds regardless of large Stage 1/2 gap.

MIA @ TB.reasoning: TB's A-grade setup (score=5) features Drew Rasmussen vs Eury Pérez with SP edge 1.92 xERA and PQI=+23.5 satisfying HARD CAP 5 for the F1_xera_gap=2.28* thin-sample asterisk. Stage 1/2 broadly aligned (f5_full_delta=0.1277 < 0.15). Edge=+3.08pp falls below the [4,15]pp staking floor — no stake placed. Confidence_downgrade=True noted but does not change the direction. TB direction is multi-signal supported; the pipeline correctly applies stake_mult=0 given the below-band edge.
lessons_applied: F1_xera_gap* thin-sample requires PQI backup (HARD CAP 5) — satisfied
edge below 4pp band floor correctly zeros stake regardless of grade

BAL @ WSH.reasoning: WSH's D-grade (-1) reflects structural headwinds: SP edge 0.87 xERA AGAINST WSH (Brandon Young outrates Miles Mikolas on xERA) and PQI AGAINST (Δ=-16.1). Only F3=2637.6 supports the WSH direction. Edge=+1.70pp below the staking band. On 2026-05-15, WSH won a D-grade SKIP (variance), but that does not elevate the tier. Live API confirms Mikolas is the WSH home SP — his veteran status does not override the xERA comparison. CONFIRM SKIP posture; directional confidence is low.
lessons_applied: D-grade SKIP wins are expected variance — do not elevate tier based on prior directional win
F3-only support without F1/F2 backup is insufficient for GOLD tier direction confidence

PHI @ PIT.reasoning: Live API confirms Zack Wheeler starts for PHI — a top-tier MLB ace. The model's SP edge 1.66 xERA favoring Skenes is flagged small-sample (min_pa=95), making the xERA comparison unreliable against a pitcher of Wheeler's quality. Market prices PHI at 62.7% (fair_prob=0.373 < 0.42 floor), validating Wheeler's advantage. Edge=+19.44pp sits in the calibration_caution_18_25pp suspect band. PHI @ PIT on 2026-05-15 was a LOSS with similar signals. DOWNGRADE: elite opposing ace + market consensus + calibration-suspect edge makes PIT direction unreliable.
lessons_applied: small-sample SP asterisk + elite opposing ace = market holds better information (validated in archive)
fair_prob < 0.42 signals strong market disagreement with model direction
calibration_caution_18_25pp edge band reflects potential model hallucination
f5_full_delta > 0.15 Heuristic 5 concern: bullpen-carry thesis on a PHI Wheeler start is implausible

CIN @ CLE.reasoning: CLE's raw score=4 (F1_xera_gap=2.13*, F5_bullpen_gap, PQI=+30.4) was correctly capped by HARD CAP 1: edge=-11.18pp (Brady Singer vs Gavin Williams) signals market holds superior information about CIN's offense. f5_full_delta=0.2916 — CLE dominates F5 at 81.65% but the full game is only 52.49% — requires significant bullpen carry. CIN @ CLE on 2026-05-15 was a LOSS (7-6). HARD CAP 1 is authoritative; no stake. No live context overrides the negative edge.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 (negative-edge GOLD) validated 6+ times — enforce unconditionally
large f5_full_delta combined with negative edge confirms bullpen-carry thesis with market skepticism

TOR @ DET.reasoning: DET is a D-grade (-2) SKIP: no F-signal fires, SP edge 1.76 xERA AGAINST DET (Kevin Gausman for TOR significantly outrates Jack Flaherty), PQI AGAINST (Δ=-31.1), edge=-3.81pp negative. Live API confirms Gausman starts for TOR — a former Cy Young winner representing genuine SP quality that the model's D-grade correctly identifies. All structural signals point away from DET; CONFIRM SKIP.
lessons_applied: No F-signal on a D-grade pick with negative edge and SP against = reliable automatic SKIP
confirmed elite opposing SP reinforces market's negative edge pricing

NYY @ NYM.reasoning: NYM starts Freddy Peralta — dominant in archive OVERRIDE wins (DET@NYM twice: 10-2 and 9-4). Model grades NYY D (-4) SKIP with SP edge 0.65 xERA AGAINST NYY and f5_full_delta=0.2803 (NYM wins F5 at 75.5%). However, the OVERRIDE trigger requires the market to price the model's pick far below model probability. Today the market prices NYY at ~55.65% (edge=-3.12pp, market is MORE bullish on NYY than model's 52.53%). Elmer Rodríguez starts for NYY. With market consensus favoring NYY despite Peralta, and only one stacked flag (confidence_downgrade, not acute_roster), OVERRIDE conditions are not fully met. CONFIRM D-grade SKIP.
lessons_applied: DET@NYM OVERRIDE methodology: all four conditions must converge — market pricing the pick below model is required but missing here
D-grade SKIP with Peralta confirmed but market pricing NYY higher than model prevents OVERRIDE

CHC @ CHW.reasoning: HARD CAP 4 correctly demoted CHW from B+ to B- (score 3 → 1): f5_full_delta=0.1823 ≥ 0.12 combined with confidence_downgrade=True collapses the stake. F1_xera_gap=1.29* carries a thin-sample asterisk (Erick Fedde vs Colin Rea). Bullpen_fatigue stacks further. On 2026-05-15, CHC demolished CHW 10-5 in this same series. HARD CAP 4 is authoritative; stake_mult=0. CONFIRM the cap; no qualitative upside for CHW direction today.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 4 (Stage 1/2 delta >= 0.12 + confidence_downgrade) correctly applied — do not re-derive
consecutive-series HARD CAP 4 application validated (same matchup lost 10-5 yesterday)

KC @ STL.reasoning: STL holds a B- grade with F3=1081.7 (Stephen Kolek vs Andre Pallante) and Stage 1/2 tightly aligned (f5_full_delta=0.0063). PQI AGAINST STL (Δ=-6.6) and confidence_downgrade=True are mild headwinds. Edge=+0.71pp falls below the [4,15]pp staking floor — no stake placed. STL won 5-4 in this matchup on 2026-05-15 (D-grade SKIP variance win); today's B- has slightly stronger signal support but still insufficient for staking. No live context changes the no-stake posture.
lessons_applied: edge below 4pp band floor correctly zeros stake regardless of F3 signal strength
F3 + tight Stage 1/2 alignment supports direction but insufficient alone for staking

ARI @ COL.reasoning: ARI (Michael Soroka, who threw a 2026-05-11 shutout) dominates F5 at Coors: COL wins F5 at only 18.51% (f5_full_delta=0.2805). HARD CAP 1 correctly fires on edge=-4.68pp — market holds information about Lorenzen vs Soroka's current-season xERA. The 2026-05-15 postgame confirms the Coors bullpen collapse pattern (ARI won 9-1) systematically reverses large F5 SP advantages in full-game outcomes. HARD CAP 1 is authoritative; no stake. ARI direction supported by Coors pattern but negative edge prevents staking.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 (negative-edge GOLD) enforced unconditionally regardless of Coors park advantage
Coors f5_full_delta is a park artifact — maintain market-aligned full-game direction, not an OVERRIDE signal

SF @ OAK.reasoning: OAK's DIAMOND pick is the strongest signal on the slate: Jeffrey Springs (live API confirmed, full-sample F1_xera_gap=2.55, no asterisk), F2=0.033, F3=6345.7, PQI=+35.0, SP edge 1.91 xERA all confirm. Stage 1/2 agree tightly (f5_full_delta=0.0753). Edge=+12.09pp firmly in-band. pen_strain_pick_side=0.1126 (HIGH) signals SF's bullpen is vulnerable to OAK's top order. OAK at 68.19% exceeds Heuristic 1's 65% threshold, but three independent non-asterisk F-signals plus PQI=+35.0 provide the required secondary confirmation. On 2026-05-15, OAK won 5-2 at PLATINUM with near-identical signals; today is DIAMOND with all gates cleared.
lessons_applied: PLATINUM/DIAMOND with F1+F2+F3 all firing (no asterisk) + f5_full_delta < 0.10 + edge in band is validated 2-for-2 in archive
pen_strain_pick_side HIGH (>0.115) confirmed as CONFIRM signal — SF bullpen vulnerable to OAK lineup
Heuristic 1 overridden by three independent non-asterisk F-signals plus PQI=+35.0 (secondary confirmation requirement met)

LAD @ LAA.reasoning: PENDING_SP_DATA protocol applied: Grayson Rodriguez (LAA home SP) has 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date per the diag. Live API confirms Roki Sasaki starts for LAD (also 0 Statcast season-to-date, consistent with his new-arrival status). Neither SP can be scored without 100+ Statcast pitches. PENDING designation validated across 7+ archive applications — narrow outcomes in these games confirm genuine unpredictability. No directional pick.
lessons_applied: PENDING_SP_DATA protocol is validated 7+ times in archive — 0-Statcast-pitch SPs warrant no directional pick

SD @ SEA.reasoning: PENDING_SP_DATA protocol applied: Lucas Giolito (SD away SP) has 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date. Live API confirms George Kirby starts for SEA (elite, well-established) and Giolito for SD. Giolito's 0 Statcast prevents scoring the SP matchup. With Kirby on the mound, SEA likely holds a significant SP advantage once Giolito's data is available, but the PENDING protocol correctly withholds any directional pick until both SPs can be quantified.
lessons_applied: PENDING_SP_DATA protocol: even when one SP is clearly elite (Kirby), 0-Statcast opposing SP prevents scoring — no directional pick
